text.div:
This code system https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emc-custom-codes-codes defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinition
EmCare.A.DE01 Unique identificationUnique identifier provided or a universal ID, if used in the country
EmCare.A.DE02 Unique identificationAuto-generated unique identification if used by the implementation
EmCare.A.DE03 Child's Identity unknown/prefer to remain anonymousThe client's identity is unknown or the client's prefers to remain anonymous
EmCare.A.DE04 First nameClient's first name
EmCare.A.DE05 Middle NameClient's middle name
EmCare.A.DE06 Last nameClient's family name or last name
EmCare.A.DE08 Date of birthThe client's date of birth (DOB), if known, OR the estimated date of birth IF not known (see EmCare.A.DE10)
EmCare.A.DE09 Time of BirthThe client's time of birth (if <1 day old)
EmCare.A.DE10 AgeAge auto-calculated (presented as number of years, months, days) of the client based on date of birth OR estimated age OR based on auto-calculation from estimaged date of birth
EmCare.A.DE11 Date of Birth not knownThe client and/or Caregiver does not know the date of birth of the client (this is to check whether the age and date of birth are facts or estimations)
EmCare.A.DE12 Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birthThe client/caregiver will provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
EmCare.A.DE14.1 Only know age in weeks/days/hoursThe Caregiver provides the age in weeks/days/hours
EmCare.A.DE13.1 Estimated AgeThe age of the client is estimated based on information provided by the caregiver
EmCare.A.DE15.1 Estimated Date of BirthEstimated Date of Birth of the Client
EmCare.A.DE16 SexThe Sex of the client
EmCare.A.DE20 AddressClient's home address or address that the client is consenting to disclose
EmCare.A.DE47 Caregiverthe child could have been created from the mother therefore a relatedpersom may already exist
newCaregiver Register a new caregivernan
EmCare.A.DE21 Primary Caregiver First NameThe client's primary Caregiver's first name
EmCare.A.DE22 Primary Caregiver Middle NameThe client's primary Caregiver's middle name
EmCare.A.DE23 Primary Caregiver Last NameThe client's primary Caregiver's last name
EmCare.A.DE35 Caregiver's Mobile telephone numberClient's Caregiver's mobile telephone number
EmCare.A.DE36 Caregiver's Home telephone numberClient's Caregiver's home telephone number
EmCare.A.DE37 Caregiver's Work telephone numberClient's Caregiver's work telephone number
EmCare.A.DE38 Caregiver wants to receive SMS or other messages regarding the child's visits and health statusThe caregiver wants to receive SMS or other messages regarding the client's contacts/visits and health status
EmCare.A.DE46 CommunicationRequest recipientThis is needed to link the CommunicationRequest to the Caregiver
EmCare.A.DE24 Primary Caregiver's Relationship to ClientThe relationship of the primary Caregiver to the client
EmCare.A.DE31 Biological Mother Vital StatusThe client's mother and father's vital status
EmCare.A.DE32 Biological Father Vital StatusThe client's mother and father's vital status
EmCare.A.DE07 Visit dateThe date and time of the client's visit
EmCare.A.DE39 Person accompanying child today is the primary CaregiverThe client is at the visit with the primary Caregiver
EmCare.A.DE45 Participant type Person accompanying childParticipant type Person accompanying child
EmCare.A.DE44 Person accompanying child todayPerson accompanying child today
EmCare.A.DE40 Person accompanying child today's First NameFirst name of person accompanying child today when client has not arrived with the primary Caregiver
EmCare.A.DE41 Person accompanying child today's Last NameLast name of person accompanying child today when client has not arrived with the primary Caregiver
EmCare.A.DE42 Person accompanying child today's contact's phone numberPhone number of the visit Caregiver
EmCare.A.DE43 Person accompanying child today's Relationship to ClientThe relationship of the visit Caregiver to the client
EmCare.B2.DE01 Type of VisitThis is the type of visit - planned or unplanned
EmCare.B3.DE01 Reason for ConsultationThe reason for the client's consultation
EmCare.B3.DE05 Is the child sick today?The client's visit is for a well child but the child is also presenting as sick
EmCare.B3.DE06 Type of ConsultationThe client's visit is for a new consultation
EmCare.B3.DE09 Referred by a Health Care Worker or Health Care FacilityThe client was referred by a Health Care Worker in the community or another Health Care Facility
EmCare.B6.DE01 Auxiliary TemperatureThe client's axillary temperature in degrees Celsius (temperature taken under the armpit)
EmCare.B6.DE02 Prefer to take Rectal TemperatureThe health care worker prefers to take the client's rectal temperature
EmCare.B6.DE03 Rectal TemperatureThe client's rectal temperature in degrees Celsius (temperature taken in the rectum)
EmCare.B6.DE04 Thermometer not availableA thermometer is not available to accurately measure the client's temperature
EmCare.B6.DE05 Hot to TouchThe client is hot to touch
EmCare.B6.DE06 WeightThe client's weight in Kilograms
EmCare.B6.DE07 Weight cannot be measuredThe client's weight cannot be measured
EmCare.B6.DE08 Estimated WeightThe client's weight has been estimated - to be used for treatment dosing only
EmCare.B6.DE09 HeightThe client's height in Centimeters
EmCare.B6.DE10 Prefer to measure lengthThe health care worker would prefer to measure the client using length
EmCare.B6.DE11 Height cannot be measuredThe client's height cannot be measured
EmCare.B6.DE12 LengthThe client's length in Centimeters
EmCare.B6.DE13 Length cannot be measuredThe client's length cannot be measured
EmCare.B6.DE14 Weight for Height (WFH) Z ScoresThe client's weight for height Z Score
EmCare.B6.DE15 Weight for Length (WFL) Z ScoresThe client's weight for length Z Score
EmCare.B6.DE16 Weight for Age (WFA) Z ScoresThe client's weight for age z score
EmCare.B6.DE17 MUAC (Mid Upper Arm Circumference)The client's Mid Upper Arm Circumference in Millimeters (child ≥6 months old)
EmCare.B6.DE18 Visually assess for whether underweight (for drug dose calculation)The health care worker visually assesses for whether underweight (for drug dosing calculations)
EmCare.B6.DE22 Date of measurementThe date when the measurement was taken
EmCare.B7.DE01 Obstructed or Absent BreathingThe client has obstructed or absent breathing
EmCare.B7.DE02 Convulsing NowThe client is convulsing now
EmCare.B7.DE03 Convulsion(s) in this IllnessThe client is reported to have had one or more convulsions
EmCare.B7.DE04 Number of convulsions in this illnessThe number of convulsion(s) the client is reported to have had in this illness
EmCare.B7.DE08 Unconscious or LethargicThe client is unconscious or lethargic
EmCare.B7.DE09 Not able to drink or breastfeedThe client has reported not to have been able to drink or breastfeed or currently is not able to drink or breastfeed.
EmCare.B7.DE10 VomitingThe client is reported to be vomiting everything or vomiting but not everything or no vomiting
EmCare.B7.DE14 Oral Fluid TestThe healthcare worker or care giver offers the client fluid to check if the client can drink and to check reactions (oral fluid test)
EmCare.B8/B9.DE01 Obstructed or Absent BreathingThe client has obstructed or absent breathing
EmCare.B8/B9.DE02 Convulsing NowThe client is convulsing now
EmCare.B10S1.DE05 CoughThe client is reported to have or has had a cough
EmCare.B10S1.DE06 Cough for how long?Length of time the client is reported to have or has had the cough
EmCare.B10S1.DE01 Difficulty BreathingThe client is reported to have or has had difficulty breathing
EmCare.B10S1.DE02 Difficulty breathing for how long?The length of time the client has or has had difficulty breathing
EmCare.B11S1.DE01 DiarrhoeaThe client is reported to have or has had diarrhoea
EmCare.B11S1.DE02 Diarrhoea for how long?The length of time the client is reported to have or has had diarrhoea
EmCare.B11S1.DE05 Blood in the stool in this IllnessThe client is reported to have or has had blood in the stool in this Illness
EmCare.B12S1.DE02 FeverThe client is reported to have or has had fever
EmCare.B12S1.DE03 Fever for how long?The length of time the client has or has had fever
EmCare.B12S1.DE06 Has Fever been present every day since the Fever started?The client has had fever present every day since the fever started
EmCare.B12S1.DE07 Refusal to Use a LimbThe client is reported to be refusing to use a limb
EmCare.B12S1.DE08 PainThe client is reported to have,  has had, or appears to be in pain
EmCare.B12S1.DE13 Malaria RiskThe client is in a high / low / no malaria risk area
EmCare.B12S1.DE17 Recent Travel to a High Malaria Risk areaThe client has recently travelled to a high Malaria risk area
EmCare.B13S1.DE01 Ear problemThe client is reported to have had or has an ear problem
EmCare.B13S1.DE02 Ear painThe client is reported to have had or has ear pain
EmCare.B13S1.DE03 Ear dischargeThe client is reported to have or has had ear discharge
EmCare.B13S1.DE04 Ear discharge for how long?The length of time client has or has had ear discharge
EmCare.B14S1.DE03 Eye ProblemThe client is reported to have an eye problem
EmCare.B14S1.DE01 Skin ProblemThe client is reported to have or has had a skin problem
EmCare.B14S1.DE02 Itchy SkinThe client is reported to have itchy skin
EmCare.B10S2.DE01 Respiratory RateThe client's respiratory rate
EmCare.B10S2.DE03 Chest IndrawingThe client has chest indrawing
EmCare.B10S2.DE04 nanThe client has been HIV exposed / infected
EmCare.B10S2.DE05 Stridor in a calm childThe client has stridor in a calm child while the client is at rest
EmCare.B10S2.DE06 WheezingThe client is wheezing
EmCare.B10S2.DE07 Recurrent WheezeThe client has experienced recurrent wheeze
EmCare.B10S2.DE08 Oxygen SaturationThe client's oxygen saturation measurement
EmCare.B11S2.DE01 Sunken eyesThe client has sunken eyes
EmCare.B11S2.DE02 Skin pinch of AbdomenThe healthcare worker pinches the skin of the client's abdomen for 1 second and then observes how long the skin takes to return to normal once released
EmCare.B11S2.DE06 Restless and IrritableThe client is restless and irritable
EmCare.B12S2.DE01 Stiff neckThe client has a stiff neck
EmCare.B12S2.DE02 Refusal to use a limbThe health care worker has seen that client is refusing to use a limb
EmCare.B12S2.DE03 Warm Tender or Swollen Joint or BoneThe client has a warm tender or swollen joint or bone
EmCare.B12S2.DE04 Oral Sores or Mouth UlcersThe client is reported to have oral sores or mouth ulcers
EmCare.B12S2.DE05 Obvious Cause of Fever (to determine if Malaria test required)The health care worker determines if there is an obvious cause of fever (to determine if Malaria test is required) If no obvious cause of fever a malaria test will be prompted
EmCare.B12S2.DE06 Runny noseThe client has a runny nose
EmCare.B12S2.DE07 Red eyesThe client has red eyes
EmCare.B12S2.DE08 Generalised rashThe client has a generalised rash
EmCare.B12S2.DE09 Measles RashThe client has a measles rash
EmCare.B12S2.DE10 Measles within the last 3 monthsThe client has had measles in the last 3 months
EmCare.B12S2.DE11 Clouding of the CorneaThe client has clouding of the cornea
EmCare.B12S2.DE12 Pus Draining from EyeThe client has pus draining from the eye
EmCare.B13S2.DE01 Tender swelling behind the earThe client has tender swelling behind the ear
EmCare.B13S2.DE02 Pus Seen Draining from the EarThe client has pus draining from the ear which has been seen by the health care worker
EmCare.B13S2.DE03 Pus Seen Draining from the Ear for how longThe length of time the client has or has had pus draining from the ear
EmCare.B14S2.DE01 Pus Draining from EyeThe client has pus draining from the eye
EmCare.B14S2.DE02 Clouding of the CorneaThe client has clouding of the cornea
EmCare.B14S2.DE03 Is Clouding of Cornea a new problemClouding of the cornea in the client is a new problem
EmCare.B14S2.DE04 Has Clouding of Cornea previously been treatedClouding of the cornea has not been previously treated in the client
EmCare.B14S2.DE05 Generalised or Localised Skin ProblemThe client has a generalised or localised skin problem
EmCare.B14S2.DE08 Blisters, Sores or PustulesThe client has blisters, sores or pustules
EmCare.B14S2.DE09 Type of Skin ProblemThe client has a specific type of skin problem(s)
EmCare.B14S2.DE18 Signs of Severe Impetigo / FolliculitisThe client has signs of Severe Impetigo / Folliculitis
EmCare.B14S2.DE29 Extensive and Severe RingwormThe client has an extensive skin problem
EmCare.B14S2.DE30 Severe SeborrheaThe client has a severe skin problem
EmCare.B14S2.DE31 Oral sores or Mouth UlcersThe client has oral sores or mouth ulcers
EmCare.B14S2.DE35 Add a Skin or Mouth or Eye ProblemThe health care worker would like to add a Skin or Mouth or Eye problem found during the physical exam
EmCare.B15S2.DE02 Severe Palmar PallorThe client has severe palmar pallor
EmCare.B15S2.DE05 Malaria RiskThe client is in a high / low / no malaria risk area
EmCare.B16S2.DE01 Oedema of both feetThe client has oedema of both feet
EmCare.A.DE01 Universal IDUnique identifier provided or a universal ID, if used in the country
EmCare.A.DE02 Auto-generated IDAuto-generated unique identification if used by the implementation
EmCare.A.DE03 Unknown IDThe client's identity is unknown or the client's prefers to remain anonymous
EmCare.A.DE17 FemaleThe client is Female
EmCare.A.DE18 MaleThe client is Male
EmCare.A.DE19 Not SpecifiedThe client's sex is not specified
EmCare.A.DE13 Estimated AgeThe age of the client is estimated based on physical evidence
EmCare.A.DE14 Only know age in weeks/days/hoursThe Caregiver provides the age in weeks/days/hours
EmCare.A.DE15 Estimated Date of BirthEstimated Date of Birth of the Client
EmCare.A.DE35 Caregiver's Mobile telephone numberClient's Caregiver's mobile telephone number
EmCare.A.DE36 Caregiver's Home telephone numberClient's Caregiver's home telephone number
EmCare.A.DE37 Caregiver's Work telephone numberClient's Caregiver's work telephone number
EmCare.A.DE25 MotherThe Caregiver is the client's mother
EmCare.A.DE26 FatherThe Caregiver is the client's father
EmCare.A.DE27 SiblingThe Caregiver is the client's sibling
EmCare.A.DE28 Extended familyThe Caregiver is the client's extended family
EmCare.A.DE29 Legal GuardianThe Caregiver is the client's legal guardian
EmCare.A.DE30 Not RelatedThe Caregiver is not related to the client
EmCare.A.DE33 UnknownBiological Mother or Father Vital Status unknown
EmCare.A.DE34 AliveBiological Mother or Father Alive
EmCare.A.DE47 DeadBiological Mother or Father dead
EmCare.A.DE38 SMSSMS
EmCare.B2.DE02 PlannedThe visit is planned
EmCare.B2.DE03 UnplannedThe visit is unplanned
EmCare.B3.DE02 Life Threatening EmergencyThe client had a life threatening emergency
EmCare.B3.DE03 Sick ChildThe client's visit is for a sick child consultation
EmCare.B3.DE04 Well ChildThe client's visit is for a well child consultation
yes YesYes
no NoNo
EmCare.B3.DE07 New ConsultationThe client's visit is for a new consultation
EmCare.B3.DE08 Follow UpThe client's visit is for a follow up consultation
EmCare.B10S1.DE07 Less than 14 daysThe client has had a cough for less than 14 days
EmCare.B10S1.DE08 14 days or MoreThe client has had a cough for 14 days or more
EmCare.B10S1.DE03 Less than 14 daysThe client has had difficulty breathing for less than 14 days
EmCare.B10S1.DE04 14 days or MoreThe client has had difficulty breathing for 14 days or more
EmCare.B11S1.DE03 Less than 14 daysThe client has had diarrhoea for less than 14 days
EmCare.B11S1.DE04 14 days or MoreThe client has had diarrhoea for 14 days or more
EmCare.B12S1.DE04 Less than 7 daysThe client has had fever for less than 7 days
EmCare.B12S1.DE05 7 Days or moreThe client has had fever for 7 days or more
joint_pain Joint or Bone PainThe client is reported to have or has had joint or bone pain
EmCare.B12S1.DE09 Pain or Difficulty Passing Urine or Crying when Passing UrineThe client is reported to have or has had pain or difficulty passing urine or crying when passing urine
EmCare.B12S1.DE10 Skin ProblemThe client is reported to have or is observed to have skin pain or problem
EmCare.B12S1.DE11 Ear PainThe client is reported to have or has had ear pain
EmCare.B12S1.DE12 OtherThe client is reported to have or has had another type of pain
no_pain No PainThe client is reported to have no pain
EmCare.B12S1.DE14 High Malaria RiskThe client is in a high malaria risk area
EmCare.B12S1.DE15 Low Malaria RiskThe client is in a low malaria risk area
EmCare.B12S1.DE16 No Malaria RiskThe client is in a no malaria risk area
EmCare.B13S1.DE05 Less than 14 daysThe client has had ear discharge for less than 14 days
EmCare.B13S1.DE06 14 days or moreThe client has had ear discharge for 14 days or more
oxygen_saturation_above_90 Oxygen Saturation >= 90 %The client's oxygen saturation is more than or equal to 90 %
EmCare.B10S2.DE09 Oxygen Saturation < 90 %The client's oxygen saturation is less than 90 %
EmCare.B10S2.DE10 Oxygen saturation not measuredThe clients oxygen saturation was not measured
EmCare.B7.DE05 One ConvulsionThe client is reported to have had one convulsion in this illness
EmCare.B7.DE06 Two or more convulsionsThe client is reported to have had two or more convulsions in this illness
EmCare.B7.DE11 Vomiting EverythingThe client is reported to be vomiting everything
EmCare.B7.DE12 Vomiting but Not EverythingThe client is reported to be vomiting but not vomiting everything
EmCare.B7.DE15 Vomits immediately / everythingThe client vomits immediately / everything
EmCare.B7.DE16 Completely unable to drinkThe client is completely unable to drink
EmCare.B7.DE17 Drinks poorlyThe client drinks poorly
EmCare.B7.DE18 Drinks eagerly / thirstilyThe client drinks eagerly / thirstily
EmCare.B7.DE19 Drinks normallyThe client drinks normally
EmCare.B7.DE20 Unable to perform test - assumes vomits everything/unable to drinkThe health care worker is unable to perform test on the client therefore the health care worker should assume the client vomits everything or is unable to drink
fluid_test_passed SuccessfulThe client passes the fluid test
EmCare.B11S2.DE03 Skin Pinch Goes back Very slowly (More than 2 seconds)The client's skin goes back very slowly after skin pinch of abdomen (More than 2 seconds)
EmCare.B11S2.DE04 Skin Pinch Goes back Slowly (2 seconds or fewer, but not immediately)The client's skin goes back slowly after skin pinch of abdomen (2 seconds or fewer, but not immediately)
EmCare.B11S2.DE05 Goes back Normally (immediately)The client's skin goes back normally after skin pinch of abdomen (immediately)
EmCare.B14S2.DE19 Skin Lesions ≥ 4 cmThe client has Skin Lesions ≥ 4 cm
EmCare.B14S2.DE20 Red Skin StreaksThe client has red skin streaks
EmCare.B14S2.DE21 Tender Nodes (Nodules) under the skinThe client has tender nodes (nodules) under the skin that can appear on any part of the face or body
EmCare.B14S2.DE22 Skin Infection extends to MuscleThe client has skin infection that extends to muscle
EmCare.B14S2.DE23 Molluscum Contagiosum - Skin coloured pearly white papules with central umbilication. Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children.The client has Molluscum Contagiosum - Skin coloured pearly white papules with central umbilication. Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children.
EmCare.B14S2.DE24 Warts - Papules or nodules with a rough (Verrucous) surfaceThe client has Warts - Papules or nodules with a rough (Verrucous) surface
EmCare.B14S2.DE25 Seborrhea - Greasy scales and redness on central face and body foldsThe client has Seborrhea - Greasy scales and redness on central face and body folds
EmCare.B14S2.DE26 Fixed Drug Reactions - Generalised red, wide spread with small bumps or blisters; or one or more dark skin areasThe client has Fixed Drug Reactions - Generalised red, wide spread with small bumps or blisters; or one or more dark skin areas
EmCare.B14S2.DE27 Eczema - Wet oozing sores or excoriated, thick patchesThe client has Eczema - Wet oozing sores or excoriated, thick patches
EmCare.B14S2.DE28 Steven Johnson Syndrome - Severe reaction due to cotrimoxazole or NVP involving the skin as well as the eyes and the mouth. Might cause difficulty in breathingThe client has Steven Johnson Syndrome - Severe reaction due to cotrimoxazole or NVP involving the skin as well as the eyes and the mouth. Might cause difficulty in breathing
EmCare.B13S2.DE04 Less than 14 daysThe client has had pus draining from the ear for less than 14 days
EmCare.B13S2.DE05 14 days or moreThe client has had pus draining from the ear for 14 days or more
EmCare.B14S2.DE06 Generalised Skin ProblemThe client has a generalised skin problem
EmCare.B14S2.DE07 Localised Skin ProblemThe client has a localised skin problem
EmCare.B14S2.DE10 Possible Serious Abscess - Hot Tender SwellingThe client has a possible serious abscess - Hot tender swelling
EmCare.B14S2.DE11 Cellulitis - Red Tender SkinThe client has Cellulitis - Red tender skin
EmCare.B14S2.DE12 Papular Itching Rash(Prurigo) - Itching rash with small papules and scratch marks. Dark spots with pale centreThe client has Papular Itching Rash(Prurigo) - itching rash with small papules and scratch marks. Dark spots with pale centre
EmCare.B14S2.DE13 Ringworm (Tinea) - An itchy circular lesion with a raised edge and fine scaly area in the centre with loss of hair. May also be found on body or web on feetThe client has Ringworm (Tinea) - An itchy circular lesion with a raised edge and fine scaly area in the centre with loss of hair. May also be found on body or web on feet
EmCare.B14S2.DE14 Scabies - Rash and excoriations on torso; burrows in web space and wrists, face sparedThe client has Scabies - Rash and excoriations on torso; burrows in web space and wrists, face spared
EmCare.B14S2.DE15 Chickenpox - Vesicles over body. Vesicles appear progressively over days and form scabs after they ruptureThe client has Chickenpox - Vesicles over body. Vesicles appear progressively over days and form scabs after they rupture
EmCare.B14S2.DE16 Herpes Zoster - Vesicles in one area on one side of body with intense pain or scars plus shooting pain. Uncommon in children except where they are immuno-compromised (e.g. if infected with HIV)The client has Herpes Zoster - Vesicles in one area on one side of body with intense pain or scars plus shooting pain. Uncommon in children except where they are immuno-compromised (e.g. if infected with HIV)
EmCare.B14S2.DE17 Impetigo / Folliculitis - Red, Tender, Warm Crusts or Small lesionsThe client has Impetigo / Folliculitis - Red, Tender, Warm Crusts or Small lesions
EmCare.B14S2.DE32 Oral ThrushThe client has oral thrush
EmCare.B14S2.DE33 Mouth Sores or Mouth Ulcers - Deep and ExtensiveThe client has mouth sores or mouth ulcers that are deep and extensive
EmCare.B14S2.DE34 Mouth Sores or Mouth Ulcers - Not Deep and ExtensiveThe client has mouth sores or mouth ulcers that are not deep and extensive
EmCare.B14S2.DE36 Skin ProblemThe health care worker would like to add a skin problem
EmCare.B14S2.DE37 Oral Sores or Mouth UlcersThe health care worker would like to add an Oral Sores or Mouth Ulcers problem
EmCare.B14S2.DE38 Eye ProblemThe health care worker would like to add an Eye problem
EmCare.B15S2.DE01 Palmar PallorThe client has palmar pallor
EmCare.B15S2.DE03 Some Palmar PallorThe client has some palmar pallor
EmCare.B15S2.DE04 No Palmar PallorThe client has no palmar pallor
EmCare.B15S2.DE06 High Malaria RiskThe client is in a high malaria risk area
EmCare.B15S2.DE07 Low Malaria RiskThe client is in a low malaria risk area
EmCare.B15S2.DE08 No Malaria RiskThe client is in a no malaria risk area

name: emc-custom-codes_codes

description: Set of codes identified as being needed but not found in existing Code Systems
